events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: The legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like "Hello" and "All Night Long," was born on June 20, 1949.

angles.name: Smooth Operator
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Lionel Richie today! From The Commodores to his massive solo success, his smooth vocals and timeless hits have soundtracked so many moments.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for her vibrant style and anthems like "Girls Just Want to Have Fun," was born on June 22, 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Celebrate
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Her unique style and empowering anthems still sound absolutely fantastic.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, the iconic singer-songwriter who would have turned 63 today, born on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: A True Icon
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael today, who would have been 63. His music and artistry continue to inspire.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: On June 25, 2009, the world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who died at the age of 50.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the undisputed King of Pop, Michael Jackson, on the anniversary of his passing. His groundbreaking music and iconic performances changed the industry forever.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today, born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Peace & Love Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From the Beatles to his solo career, his enduring message of peace and love continues to shine.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today, born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! That iconic guitar sound is simply unmistakable.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman and rock icon, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! The energy, the moves, the voice – a true rock and roll legend.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' "Video Killed the Radio Star" as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV launched and changed music forever. And how ironic was that first video?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' released in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Masterpiece
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh and defiant as ever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: Rewind to 1969: The Woodstock Festival began on this day. An iconic event that brought together half a million for peace, love, and incredible music.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the one and only King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley. His music and legend live on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Hip-hop legend Tupac Shakur tragically passed away on September 13, 1996, days after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Remembering A Legend
angles.copy: Reflecting on the profound impact of Tupac Shakur today. His lyrical genius and powerful voice continue to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, the groundbreaking guitar virtuoso who passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. He truly redefined what a guitar could do.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Cover, Timeless Tracks
angles.copy: That famous zebra crossing! The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' was released 57 years ago. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today, born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking, still iconic. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today, born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad For It!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that swagger and those unforgettable tunes.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful anthem "Imagine" was first released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: A Timeless Message
angles.copy: On this day, we reflect on the enduring message of peace and hope from John Lennon's iconic track 'Imagine'.

events.title: The first Apple iPod was unveiled in 2001
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: 1,000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped? Apple unveiled this game-changer on this day in 2001, putting a thousand songs right in your pocket.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent and the enduring film franchise.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film, theme tune, or iconic moment from 007's incredible legacy?
